title: frangula ursina
intro: Frangula ursina, also known as bearberry or kinnikinnick, is a small shrub native to North America, characterized by its red berries and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its astringent and antiseptic properties, which help to treat various health conditions, including urinary tract infections, diarrhea, and skin issues. The health benefits of Frangula ursina include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Frangula ursina can be prepared in various forms, such as tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used to support kidney health and urinary function.
